key.name: gap-size
key.description: Size of the gap between tiled windows in pixels

key.name: edge-gap
key.description: Size of the gap at the edges of the screen in pixels

key.name: focus-right
key.description: Move focus to the next window on the right

key.name: focus-left
key.description: Move focus to the next window on the left

key.name: focus-down
key.description: Move focus to the workspace below

key.name: focus-up
key.description: Move focus to the workspace above

key.name: move-left
key.description: Swap the focused window with the one to its left

key.name: move-right
key.description: Swap the focused window with the one to its right

key.name: move-down
key.description: Move the focused window to the workspace below

key.name: move-up
key.description: Move the focused window to the workspace above

key.name: toggle-size
key.description: Toggle the focused window between half and full width

key.name: kestrel-toggle-overview
key.description: Toggle the bird's-eye overview of all workspaces

key.name: new-window
key.description: Open a new window of the focused application

key.name: toggle-notifications
key.description: Enter notification focus mode for keyboard-driven permission handling

key.name: toggle-help
key.description: Show or hide the keyboard shortcuts help sheet

key.name: close-window
key.description: Close the currently focused window

key.name: join-stack
key.description: Stack the focused window with its left neighbor column, or unstack if already stacked

key.name: force-workspace-up
key.description: Always switch to workspace above, even from middle of a stack

key.name: force-workspace-down
key.description: Always switch to workspace below, even from middle of a stack

key.name: column-count
key.description: How many columns fill the viewport width. slotWidth = totalWidth / columnCount

key.name: focus-border-width
key.description: Width of the focus indicator border in pixels

key.name: focus-border-color
key.description: Color of the focus indicator border (CSS color string)

key.name: focus-border-radius
key.description: Border radius of the focus indicator in pixels

key.name: focus-background-color
key.description: Background color of the focus indicator (CSS color string)

key.name: debug-mode
key.description: Enable verbose logging and DBus debug interface

key.name: saved-state
key.description: Serialized world state for persistence across disable/enable cycles (e.g. screen lock)

key.name: quake-slot-1
key.description: Desktop app ID for quake slot 1 (e.g. 'org.gnome.Terminal.desktop')

key.name: quake-slot-2
key.description: Desktop app ID for quake slot 2

key.name: quake-slot-3
key.description: Desktop app ID for quake slot 3

key.name: quake-slot-4
key.description: Desktop app ID for quake slot 4

key.name: quake-slot-1-toggle
key.description: Toggle the quake console for slot 1

key.name: quake-slot-2-toggle
key.description: Toggle the quake console for slot 2

key.name: quake-slot-3-toggle
key.description: Toggle the quake console for slot 3

key.name: quake-slot-4-toggle
key.description: Toggle the quake console for slot 4

key.name: workspace-todos-toggle
key.description: Toggle the TODO overlay for the current workspace

key.name: quake-prelaunch
key.description: Launch all configured quake applications on startup so they are ready instantly

key.name: quake-width-percent
key.description: Width of the quake overlay window as a percentage of screen width

key.name: quake-height-percent
key.description: Height of the quake overlay window as a percentage of screen height
